metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students explore the principles and practices of conducting business online, from establishing digital storefronts to managing online transactions and digital marketing strategies. This course emphasizes the operational, marketing, and technical aspects of e-commerce in the digital economy.
metadata.general_description: Online business models, digital storefronts, payment systems, and digital marketing strategies for modern e-commerce.

big_ideas.statement: E-commerce removes geographic and temporal barriers, enabling businesses to reach global customers continuously
big_ideas.elaboration: Online platforms allow entrepreneurs to operate beyond physical limitations, serving customers across time zones and geographic locations.

big_ideas.statement: Digital storefronts require careful design of user experience, product presentation, and transaction flow to maximize conversion
big_ideas.elaboration: Successful e-commerce requires integration of intuitive navigation, compelling product information, secure payment systems, and streamlined checkout processes.

big_ideas.statement: Digital marketing strategies build customer awareness and drive traffic through targeted, data-driven approaches
big_ideas.elaboration: E-commerce success depends on understanding customer behavior, optimizing search visibility, leveraging social media, and measuring campaign effectiveness.

big_ideas.statement: E-commerce platforms must manage operational complexity including inventory, fulfillment, customer service, and data security
big_ideas.elaboration: Behind every online transaction lies a supply chain, payment processing, customer relationship management, and cybersecurity infrastructure.

competencies.raw: Design e-commerce business models and strategies tailored to market opportunities
i_can_statements: I can analyze market gaps and identify viable e-commerce opportunities
I can design business models appropriate for different product types
I can develop competitive positioning and value propositions
I can create business plans for online ventures

competencies.raw: Design digital storefronts that engage customers and facilitate transactions
i_can_statements: I can plan website structure and navigation for optimal user experience
I can design product pages that showcase items effectively
I can create shopping cart and checkout flows that minimize abandonment
I can design responsive layouts for multiple devices and platforms

competencies.raw: Design digital marketing campaigns that reach target audiences effectively
i_can_statements: I can develop integrated digital marketing strategies
I can plan social media campaigns and content calendars
I can design email marketing and personalization strategies
I can create search engine optimization and paid advertising plans

competencies.raw: Design operational systems that support reliable e-commerce delivery
i_can_statements: I can plan inventory management systems for online businesses
I can design order fulfillment and logistics processes
I can develop customer service strategies and support systems
I can plan data security and payment processing infrastructure

competencies.raw: Apply e-commerce platforms to create and manage online stores
i_can_statements: I can set up and configure e-commerce platforms
I can upload and organize products with descriptions and images
I can configure pricing, promotions, and inventory settings
I can manage orders and customer information

competencies.raw: Apply payment processing and security systems to protect transactions
i_can_statements: I can implement payment gateway integration
I can configure multiple payment methods
I can apply SSL certificates and encryption standards
I can ensure PCI compliance and secure data handling

competencies.raw: Apply digital marketing techniques to drive traffic and conversions
i_can_statements: I can optimize websites for search engines
I can create and manage social media marketing campaigns
I can execute email marketing campaigns and measure effectiveness
I can implement analytics to track customer behavior

competencies.raw: Apply customer relationship management to build loyalty and repeat business
i_can_statements: I can implement CRM systems to track customer interactions
I can create customer segmentation and personalization strategies
I can develop loyalty programs and retention strategies
I can analyze customer data to improve service

competencies.raw: Use e-commerce platforms and technologies to build online presence
i_can_statements: I can use website builders and e-commerce platforms effectively
I can leverage shopping cart software and catalog management tools
I can implement inventory tracking technologies
I can integrate third-party applications and services

competencies.raw: Use digital marketing tools and analytics platforms effectively
i_can_statements: I can use SEO tools to optimize website visibility
I can leverage social media management platforms
I can implement analytics and conversion tracking
I can use marketing automation tools

competencies.raw: Use mobile technologies to extend e-commerce reach
i_can_statements: I can develop mobile-optimized shopping experiences
I can implement mobile payment solutions
I can create mobile apps or progressive web applications
I can optimize for voice search and emerging technologies

competencies.raw: Use data analytics to optimize e-commerce performance
i_can_statements: I can interpret web analytics and traffic data
I can track conversion rates and customer acquisition costs
I can use A/B testing to optimize website elements
I can create dashboards to monitor key performance indicators

areas.name: E-Commerce Business Models and Strategies
topics: B2C, B2B, C2C, and D2C business models
E-commerce market analysis and competitive landscape
Niche identification and target market selection
Business plan development for online ventures

areas.name: Digital Storefront Design and User Experience
areas.raw: Digital Storefront Design and User Experience

areas.name: Digital Marketing and Customer Acquisition
topics: Search engine optimization and paid search advertising
Social media marketing and influencer partnerships
